summary:
SEEKING JUSTICE FOR CHARLIE KIRK: Brandon leads an intense spiritual intercession for the swift capture of the individual who committed a heinous act against Charlie Kirk. Brandon reveals that through prophetic insight, he knows the shooter did not act alone and has up to four accomplices. He emphasizes that this event is tied to a much deeper, demonically energized scheme, urging believers to pray for confusion in the enemy's camp and the exposure of anyone harboring or aiding these criminals so they can face immediate justice.

PROTECTING THE YOUTH AND CAMPUSES: Brandon issues a prophetic warning concerning planned mass events and threats targeting college campuses, football games, and tailgate parties, specifically mentioning the University of Alabama and the University of Texas in Austin. Alongside this warning of danger, Brandon prophesies a massive spiritual revival and harvest of souls that will spontaneously erupt among the youth at these exact college locations.

URGENT WARNINGS FOR AMERICAN CITIES: Brandon delivers a severe alert requiring immediate prayer coverage for five major cities, which are Washington D.C., New York City, Boston, Chicago, and Philadelphia. He describes a profound prophetic vision where five angels thundered from west to east across the sky, crying out against America and signaling that a great shaking and storm have arrived. Furthermore, Brandon recounts seeing natural disasters, including a massive volcanic eruption and a monumental earthquake on the West Coast that creates a deep crack in the earth.

HEDGE OF PROTECTION OVER LEADERS: Brandon passionately prays for the safety of several high-profile political and religious figures against wicked plots. He specifically pleads for spiritual protection over Donald Trump, JD Vance, and the extended Trump family, including Don Jr., Kai, Eric, Ivanka, Tiffany, and Barron. Brandon also extends this spiritual covering to prominent church leaders such as Joel Osteen and Steven Furtick, decreeing that no weapon formed against them shall prosper and that any hidden plots will be exposed.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND THE POINT OF NO RETURN: Brandon teaches the importance of praying in tongues as a secret, perfect language to God, referencing Kenneth E. Hagin's teachings, and stresses the necessity of the Holy Spirit to navigate the current dark times. He highlights the week of the twenty-third as a critical timeline in the spirit realm, describing it as a point of no return where everything will change rapidly. Brandon sees visions of fires, darkness, and four doves, indicating that the dispensation of grace is closing and time is running out.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND CALL TO SALVATION: Brandon foresees a massive, worldwide harvest of souls, highlighting a rising sun of revival over Africa, a fresh fire across European nations, and an awakening in Australia. He issues a heartfelt altar call, urging listeners who are backslidden or lost to surrender completely to Jesus and turn their backs on the world. Brandon guides them through a prayer of salvation, encourages them to join a fire-filled, non-denominational church, get water baptized, and immerse themselves strictly in reliable Bible translations to build a solid spiritual foundation.
